etymology.description: semantic 木(木) (mù, "wood") + phonetic 容(容) (róng, "contain") -> banyan
etymology.interpretation: The character 榕 (róng, "banyan") combines the semantic 木(木) (mù, "wood") to indicate a connection with trees, with the phonetic 容(容) (róng, "contain") to convey the sound. This reflects its meaning related to a type of tree, specifically the banyan.

examples.chinese: 榕树是我家附近的标志性植物(榕樹是我家附近的標誌性植物)。
examples.pinyin: Róngshù shì wǒ jiā fùjìn de biāozhìxìng zhíwù.
examples.english: The banyan tree is a symbolic plant near my home.

examples.chinese: 在公园里(在公園裡)，我常在榕树下阅读(我常在榕樹下閱讀)。
examples.pinyin: Zài gōngyuán lǐ, wǒ cháng zài róngshù xià yuèdú.
examples.english: In the park, I often read under the banyan tree.

examples.chinese: 榕树的根系非常发达(榕樹的根系非常發達)，能够抵抗强风(能夠抵抗強風)。
examples.pinyin: Róngshù de gēnxì fēicháng fādá, nénggòu dǐkàng qiángfēng.
examples.english: The roots of the banyan tree are very developed and can withstand strong winds.
